items.title: Microsoft is letting Office users remove an annoying Copilot button
items.description: Microsoft is rolling out Office app updates next week that allow users to disable a floating Copilot button. items.title: States ask judge to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster
items.description: A federal judge is officially being tasked with deciding whether to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster.
